items.requirement: README.md accurately states that the current goal-completion audit reports 25/25 and points to validation/reports/final_verification.json.
items.evidence: README states the completed prior milestone audit is 25/25 and links final verification evidence.

items.requirement: docs/18_deterministic_poc_status.md includes final-verification and goal-audit commands while preserving safety boundaries.
items.evidence: Status document lists final-verification and goal-audit commands and keeps implemented/deferred/not-claimed boundaries.

items.requirement: sentinel_workbench.final_verification no longer leaves a plausible all-pass durable report if interrupted during bootstrap/self-verification.
items.evidence: Final verification no longer writes a fake all-pass bootstrap report to the durable report path.

items.requirement: Tests cover the hardened final-verification behavior, including the non-bootstrap committed report requirement.
items.evidence: Tests require a non-bootstrap committed final-verification report and allow only explicit self-verification mode during the command run.

items.requirement: A rendered-UX verification artifact exists for the local staged app and covers the required workflow surfaces.
items.evidence: UX verification report covers landing, pre-process, node audit, ensemble, result summary, deeper dive, and layout guards.

items.requirement: PROGRESS.md has a latest-status or supersession note for older chronological entries.
items.evidence: Progress log has a latest-status note explaining that newer sections supersede older chronological pending/future-work entries.

items.requirement: OpenRouter documentation distinguishes implemented comparison harness from deferred app-integrated LLM mode and formal model-swap evaluation.
items.evidence: OpenRouter docs separate the implemented comparison harness from deferred app-integrated LLM mode and formal model-swap evaluation.

items.requirement: The goal-completion audit is updated to the new remediation goal shape and is not mistaken for the completed 25-item milestone.
items.evidence: Current audit shape is the ten-item completeness-scan remediation goal, not the prior 25-item milestone.
Final verification report records passing pytest, case validation, static input validation, evaluation regeneration, UX verification, JSON syntax, and git diff checks.

items.requirement: Stale status claims and committed bootstrap markers are absent from current proof artifacts.
items.evidence: No stale current-state pending-audit claims or committed bootstrap markers remain.
